title: Alternate 3D Potions
description: Give your potions some 3D flair! (water and honey too :] )
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/L23ap1o5/images/34491dba510173781f5111a2c73552621ee6b307.png) **Works without mods!** Give your potions some 3D flair with these custom models for bottles and potions, this includes splash and lingering potions too! Resource pack contains only the potion, glass_bottle and honey_bottle textures, so it should work with any other resource pack as long as you make sure this is on top in the resource pack menu! anyway enjoy :] report any issues you have on the website! --- please do not redistribute without my consent (feel free to use in modrinth or curseforge modpacks though!)
if you make variations from this please credit me :]
